_README: Secret VALUES only. This file is git-ignored and chmod 0600 — agents never read it. Shape is { "<envName>": { "<KEY>": "<value>" } }, keyed by the environment names in emberflow.environments.json. A value of "$ENV:VAR_NAME" is resolved from process.env.VAR_NAME at load (a missing env var resolves to empty and warns). A legacy flat { "<KEY>": "<value>" } file is still read and treated as the "local" environment.
